description: Repo-to-MCP-profile mapping. Each repo is assigned an MCP profile. Unmapped repos default to baseline.

protected-repo.rationale: ARCHIVED — local-first prototype. Do not use for production. Superseded by protected-repo-prod.

protected-repo-prod.rationale: Canonical production protected-repo PWA (Vite 6 + React 19 + Tailwind v4). Browser evidence, visual QA, and design iteration are critical.

example-app.rationale: Local-first Life OS (React 19 + Vite + Tailwind v4). UI verification and visual QA required for encrypted vault and AI mentor surfaces.

example-app-sandbox.rationale: Sandbox/worktree copy of example-app. Should match example-app MCP profile. Not yet cloned locally.

StableVault.rationale: Regulated stablecoin platform (React 19 + Vite + Solana). UI verification needed for tokenization interface. Not yet cloned locally.

example-toolchainMissionControl.rationale: Centralized operations platform (Next.js + FastAPI). Dashboard UI requiring visual validation. Not yet cloned locally.

demo-project.rationale: UI/product app requiring visual validation and browser testing.

example-dashboard.rationale: Dashboard UI requiring visual validation and browser testing.

example-orchestrator-PROD.rationale: example-orchestrator control plane (Express + React + Vite). Has React UI on localhost:3100 requiring visual validation.

apa-digital-asset-product.rationale: Special profile for APA's domain-specific agents and factory workflow. Approved by ADR.

sample-service.rationale: Automation-heavy repo. Restricted MCP surface, no design/browser-heavy tools.

career-ops.rationale: Career pipeline management. Minimal MCP surface needed. Has custom commands but no browser/design requirements.

agent-ready.rationale: Agent readiness testing. Minimal MCP surface.

example-analyzer.rationale: Portfolio analysis tool. Minimal MCP surface.

example-platform.rationale: Life planning tool. Minimal MCP surface.

notes: New repos automatically get baseline profile. To assign a different profile, update this file and ensure the repo has the required MCP servers enabled. Repos marked 'Not yet cloned locally' have profile mappings pre-registered so they are correct when cloned.
